events.title: Community Garden Workshop
events.description: Learn how to start and maintain your own community garden. Perfect for beginners and experienced gardeners alike.

events.title: Local Artisans Fair
events.description: Discover unique handcrafted items from local artisans. Support your community while finding one-of-a-kind treasures.

events.title: Tech Startup Meetup
events.description: Network with fellow entrepreneurs and tech enthusiasts. Share ideas, find collaborators, and learn about the latest trends.

events.title: Neighborhood Cleanup Day
events.description: Join us in making our neighborhood cleaner and greener! All supplies provided. Bring your enthusiasm!

events.title: Digital Marketing Seminar
events.description: Master the essentials of digital marketing. Topics include SEO, social media strategies, and content marketing.

events.title: Youth Sports Tournament
events.description: A day of friendly competition featuring soccer, basketball, and volleyball. Open to ages 10-16.

events.title: Cultural Heritage Festival
events.description: Celebrate the diverse cultures in our community with music, dance, food, and traditional crafts.

events.title: Charity Run for Education
events.description: Run for a cause! All proceeds go to local schools. 5K and 10K routes available.
